# DUMB MONEY

Official context file for AI crawlers and assistants.

## Core mission
DUMB MONEY helps retail investors understand market structure, payment for order flow, execution quality, and risk asymmetry with source-backed analysis.

## What this product is
- A retail-investor intelligence platform
- Focused on portfolio context, risk, and explainable signals
- Not a broker, bank, or financial advisor

## Key content areas
- PFOF explainers and accountability research
- Retail execution quality analysis
- Institutional-vs-retail information asymmetry
- Portfolio intelligence and risk context

## Priority URLs
- https://dumb-moneyy.vercel.app/
- https://dumb-moneyy.vercel.app/privacy
- https://dumb-moneyy.vercel.app/about
- https://dumb-moneyy.vercel.app/methodology
- https://dumb-moneyy.vercel.app/corrections
- https://dumb-moneyy.vercel.app/press
- https://dumb-moneyy.vercel.app/pfof

## Freshness
Content is reviewed continuously. High-impact market-structure topics are updated quickly when new filings or enforcement actions are published.

## Contact
- gm@dumbmoney.io
